calendar.title: Tournament Calendar
calendar.description: Explore the World Cup 2026 match schedule and live results.
calendar.timezoneNote: All kickoff times are displayed in your local timezone: {tz}
calendar.noMatches: No matches found matching your filters.

home.subtitle: Predict the groups. Forecast the knockout matches. Project your tournament path and track your scores live to compete against friends for the ultimate sweepstake.
home.copyright: © 2026 World Cup Sweepstake. All Rights Reserved.

auth.subtitle: Sign in to project predictions and track your standings.

profile.title: Edit Profile
profile.description: Update your display name and avatar.
profile.emailNote: Email cannot be changed — it is your identity.

bets.title: My Bets
bets.description: Create and manage your tournament predictions.
bets.deadlinePassed: The bet deadline has passed. No further changes can be made.
bets.limitReached: You've reached the maximum of {count} bets.
bets.noBets: No bets yet. Add your first prediction above.
bets.addBetPlaceholder: Bet label (e.g. Spain wins it all)
bets.removeDialogDescription: This bet and all its predictions will be permanently deleted.
bets.incompleteDescription: You have predicted {predicted} of {total} knockout matches. You must complete all matches before closing your bet.
bets.closeConfirmDescription: Closing your bet locks your predictions. You will not be able to edit them unless you re-open the bet before the deadline.
bets.groupChangeWarningDescription: Changing standings will reset conflicting predictions in your knockout stage bracket.
bets.renameDialogDescription: Enter a new label for this bet.
bets.renameDialogInputPlaceholder: Bet label (e.g. Spain wins it all)
bets.gateMessage: This prediction is locked and will be revealed once the bet deadline passes on <date></date>.

score.noTeamsYet: No teams yet — complete the knockout bracket

communities.title: Communities
communities.noCommunitiesYet: You haven't joined any communities yet.
communities.orAskForInvite: or ask a friend for an invite link.
communities.newCommunityDescription: Create a group to compare predictions with friends.
communities.communityNameHelp: Your friends will use this name to find and join your community.
communities.noCommunitiesShowDescription: Create a new community or adjust your search.

joinCommunity.invalidInviteMessage: This invite link is invalid or has expired.
joinCommunity.invitedToJoin: You've been invited to join {name}. Confirm to join.

communitySettings.deleteCommunityDescription: Permanently delete this community and remove all members. This cannot be undone.
communitySettings.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This cannot be undone.

admin.participantsCount: {count, plural, one {# registered participant} other {# registered participants}}
admin.cannotChangeSelfRole: You cannot change your own role.
admin.cannotChangeSuperAdminRole: The super admin role cannot be changed.
admin.resultsDescription: Record the official finishing orders of the group stage.
admin.advancementGateDescription: Confirm which teams have officially advanced to the Round of 32.
admin.knockoutStageDescription: Record the official winners of the knockout matches.

tournamentErrors.FORBIDDEN: You are not authorized to modify the tournament results.
tournamentErrors.SAVE_FAILED: Failed to save the tournament results. Please try again.
tournamentErrors.PARTICIPANTS_NOT_ADVANCED: Match participants must be marked as advanced.

betErrors.FORBIDDEN: You are not authorized to modify this bet.
betErrors.PAST_DEADLINE: The bet deadline has passed. No further changes can be made.
betErrors.INCOMPLETE_PREDICTIONS: You must complete all knockout matches before closing your bet.
betErrors.SAVE_FAILED: Your bet could not be saved. Please try again.
betErrors.INVALID_LABEL: Label must be between 1 and 200 characters.
betErrors.BET_CLOSED: This bet is closed. Reopen it before making changes.

communityErrors.FORBIDDEN: You are not authorized to modify this community.
communityErrors.INVALID_NAME: Name must contain at least one letter or digit
communityErrors.OWNER_CANNOT_LEAVE: Owner cannot leave the community. Delete it instead.
communityErrors.NOT_A_MEMBER: You are not a member of this community.
communityErrors.SAVE_FAILED: Failed to save the community. Please try again.

liveErrors.FORBIDDEN: You are not authorized to modify match results.
liveErrors.INVALID_GOALS: Goals must be zero or positive.
liveErrors.PENALTIES_NOT_ALLOWED: Penalties are only allowed in knockout matches.
liveErrors.SAVE_FAILED: Failed to save the match result. Please try again.

adminMatchEditor.title: Live Scores
adminMatchEditor.description: Enter or correct live match scores. Changes apply immediately.
adminMatchEditor.knockoutOnly: Penalties only apply to knockout matches.
adminMatchEditor.noLiveResults: No live or finished matches yet.
adminMatchEditor.correctionNote: Finished scores can be corrected here.

adminTieBreak.title: Tie-Break Ordering
adminTieBreak.description: Drag teams within a tied cluster to set the final order. Separated teams are locked.
adminTieBreak.noTies: No unresolved ties at this time.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.noCommunities: You don't belong to any communities yet.
leaderboard.joinOrCreate: Join or create a community to start competing!
leaderboard.noBets: No participants have closed bets yet in this community.

tournament.title: Tournament Standings
tournament.description: Follow the live standings and tournament bracket.
tournament.liveMarkerLegend: Team is currently playing a live match
